answer:
{"tool": "python_exec", "arguments": {
"code": "from sympy import symbols, nsolve, Function, lambdify\n\
         x, a1, a2, m = symbols('x a1 a2 m', real=True)\n\
         a = Function('a[n]')(n)\n\
         a_recurrence = a(n+1).subs(n, n+1).\
                        subs(a(n), (2*n/(n+1)*a(n) - (n-1)/(n+1)*a(n-1)))\n\
         a_condition = a(n).subs(n, x) > 2 + 2009/2010\n\
         solutions = nsolve(a_recurrence, x, solveset=False, iv=[a1, a2], rtol=1e-6)\n\
         m = min([int(n) for n in solutions])+1\n\
         print(m)"
}}
